title: Solara Server Pack
description: Performance, Casual and light-adventure packed in a small server pack!
body:
# Solara Server Pack
The Solara Server Pack is the official modpack for Solara MC Server. It's a lightweight modpack mainly focused on performance improvements and trying to keep vanilla-ish feeling while playing the modpack. It added many client-side performance mods while a mix of other mods to keep a fun play experience!

## Features
- ⚡Performance - Classic performance mods such as Sodium, Lithium, Entity culling and many more to ensure that this modpack is playable even on low-performace PC
- 🌏Adventure - Mods such as Traveller's Backpack and Nature's Compass to encourage exploration and adventure over the land, spice the game and make it more exciting
- 🖥️Light Technology - Use of ComputerCraft, Extended Drawers and Tom's simple storage to help free your hands from collecting items and storing them in simpler storage system
- 🏡Building - Build with mods such as Macaw's series mods, Vertical Slabs and Moving elevator to enhance your builds
- 🎉Casual - Have a heated cooking competition with your friends with Farmer's Delight, or just want enjoy a small movie with your friends using Waterframes? This modpack got it all covered for you!
